name: list_dir
description: Lists files and directories in the given directory (optionally with recursion). Returns a JSON object with the names of directories and files within the given directory.

relative_path.title: Relative Path
relative_path.description: The relative path to the directory to list; pass "." to scan the project root.

skip_ignored_files.title: Skip Ignored Files
skip_ignored_files.description: Whether to skip files and directories that are ignored.

max_answer_chars.title: Max Answer Chars
max_answer_chars.description:
If the output is longer than this number of characters,
no content will be returned. -1 means the default value from the config will be used.
Don't adjust unless there is really no other way to get the content required for the task.
